sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_translate (original String, translated String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original;
INSERT INTO test_translate VALUES ('Münchener Straße', translateUTF8('Münchener Straße', 'üß', 'us'));
UPDATE test_translate SET translated = translateUTF8(original, 'äöü', 'aou') WHERE original LIKE '%straße%';
SELECT original, translated FROM test_translate WHERE translated = translateUTF8(original, 'ß', 'ss');
SELECT translateUTF8('Jürgen Müller', 'ü', 'u') AS res, translateUTF8('Bäcker', 'ä', 'ae') AS res2;
